name: Lemon Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. For fruit, chicken, or seafood salads: Combine cornstarch, mustard, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. In a separate bowl, combine water and beaten eggs.
3. Slowly add the egg mixture to the cornstarch, mustard, and salt mixture, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Cook over simmering water for 5 minutes, stirring continuously.
5. Very slowly stir in the lemon juice and vinegar. Continue cooking and stirring over simmering water for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat. Add the sugar substitute; mix well.
7. Pour into a pint jar, cover, and store in the refrigerator. Stir well before each use.
Food Exchange per serving: UP TO 2 TABLESPOONS MAY BE CONSIDERED "FREE" CAL: 20; CHO: 2g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 1g; SOD: 256; Low-sodium diet: Omit salt.
